raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "tja: Es redſeju eekſch mannas
Varahdichanas Nakți/ un rau-
i/ tee tſchetri Debbeß Wehji ts-
aufaß us to leelu Juhrn/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tſchetri leeli Swehri
usſahye no Juhras/ weens ar
gittadu Gihmi ne ka ohtrs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas pirmajs bija ka Lau-
wa/ un tam bij Ehrgtkũ Spahr-
nt. Es ſkattijohs teekams win-
am tee Spahrni iſpluhkti tap-
pe/ un tas tappẽ no Semmes
atxeimts/ un stahweja uß Kah-
ahm/ ka weens Zilweks/ un tam
tappe zilweziga Sirde dohta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pehz rangi/ tur bija
veens zits Swehrs/ ittin ka
veens Lahtes/ tas stahweja pee
veenas Mallas/ un tam bija
trihs leeli Sobbi fawa Mutte
tarp faweem zitteim Sobbeem/
nn us to tappẽ ka fazzihts: Zel-
ees/ un ehd dauds Baltas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz raudsiju es/ un re-
si/ tur bija wehi zits Swehrs
ittin ka weens Pardelis/tam bij
ſchetri Spahrni ka weenam
Putnam us wiꞥſch Mugguru/
r tam raſcham Swehram bij
ſchetras Galwas/ un tam tappẽ
a Waldischana dohta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pehz to raudsiju es Nak-
i/ un redſi/ tas zettorte Swehrs
ija breeſmigs un negants/ un
ohti ſtiprs/ un tam bij leeli dsel-
es Sobbi/ tas ehde/ un fatree-
e/ un faminne to zittu ar Kah-
ahm/ un tam bij zittahds Gih-
ats neka teem zitteem Sweh-
eim/ kas preckſch ta patcha bi-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "juscht/ un tam bij defintte Raggi.
8. Un es likku tohs Raggus
wehra/ un rangi/ weens zits
masajs Rags uslehze starpteem/
un wiꞥſch Preeſcha tappẽ trihs
no teem pirinajeem Raggeem is-
lausitt/ un rangi/ tanni Raggã
bija Azzis ka Zilweku Azzis/ un
weena Mutte/ kas leelas Leetas
runnaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Scho redſeju es/ teekams
Krebfli tappẽ zelti/ un tas Wez-
zajs apfehdahs/ ka Drehbes tik
baltas bija ka Sneegs/ un win-
na Galwas Matti ka ſchkhsta
Wille/ winna Krebfis bija ka
Uggunẽ Leetnas/ un winna
Skrittekri btja deggohts Uggunẽ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un no winna Preeſchas
iſtezzeja weena ugguniga Up-
pe. Tukſtoschu tukſtoschi kal-
poja tam/ un defintts reisi tukſ-
toschu tukſtoschi stahweja
preekſch winna/ ta Teeka tappẽ
turreta/ un tahs Grahnatas
tappẽ atdarritas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es ſkattijohs tahs leelas
Wallodas deht/ ko tas Rags
runnaja/ es ſkattijohs/ kamehr
tas Swehrs nokants un no-
makts tappẽ un ktua nodohts/
ka tas ar Ugguni fadedſinahts
taptu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un to zittu Swehru
Warra mittejahs arridsan/ jo
teem bija Laiks un Stunda no-
likta/ zik ilgi teem bij stahweht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl redſeju es Nakts
Parahdichanas/ un rangi/
weenã nahze eekſch tahs Debbeß
Vv
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
